Sub-Q "is the static route preferred over OSPF?"
cards.back: `show ip route X.X.X.X` — if static AD (1) < OSPF AD (110), static wins. Output shows AD in brackets `[1/0]`.

cards.front: `show ip route X.X.X.X` — if static AD (1) < OSPF AD (110), static wins. Output shows AD in brackets `[1/0]`.
cards.back: Sub-Q "is the static route preferred over OSPF?"

cards.front: Mental drill — every sim sub-question maps to which step?
cards.back: 1) Identify what's being checked (interface? routing? L2? service?) → 2) Pick the show command that answers it → 3) Run + verify → 4) Tick box

cards.front: 1) Identify what's being checked (interface? routing? L2? service?) → 2) Pick the show command that answers it → 3) Run + verify → 4) Tick box
cards.back: Mental drill — every sim sub-question maps to which step?
`show run | section ospf` (named section) or `show run | include hostname` (line match) or `show run | begin interface Gi0/0` (start at)

cards.front: `show run | section ospf` (named section) or `show run | include hostname` (line match) or `show run | begin interface Gi0/0` (start at)

cards.back: Run privileged exec commands (`show`) from inside any config mode without `end`/`exit`. Example: `R1(config-if)#do show ip route`
